summary: Line-oriented UART frame receiver that accumulates bytes cooperatively and emits parsed frames through a weak callback.
notes: This middleware uses cooperative polling with HAL_UART_Receive(..., timeout=0), which is suitable for low-rate command and telemetry streams.
Handle parsed frames by overriding UartFrame_OnFrame(...) in AppCallbacks.
sources: Common delimiter-plus-idle-gap UART framing pattern for bare-metal STM32 firmware.
